title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for a device that is not currently connected
scenario: Fit Test page is displayed when accessing Onboarding for a non-connected device in User Guides > App Settings
steps: Tap on a device that is NOT currently connected (e.g., Voyager Free 60 while a different device is connected)
expected: The Fit Test page should NOT be shown or should not be startable for a device that is not currently connected. The app should either skip the Fit Test step or display a message indicating the device is not connected.
